title: Violence Against Women in India: Rethinking Institutional Responses and Accountability
description: The 2025 research report, Violence Against Women and Girls: Strengthening Institutional Mechanisms Combating, published by the Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR), presents a comprehensive multi-state analysis of the legal and institutional frameworks addressing violence against women and girls (VAWG) […] The post Violence Against Women in India: Rethinking Institutional Responses and Accountability appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
